Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dance of a Burning World]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Dance of a Burning World is an Aetheric sword art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — The Dance of the Burning World is an Art used by Raion's Titan.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — The Dance of a Burning World is represented by Raion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — The Dance of a Burning World is Raion Raithe's Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Dance of a Burning World is an ability used by Raion Raithe.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 7''' — Dance of a Burning World is a technique that uses a blade of crimson flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 7''' — The Dance of a Burning World is a technique that ignites around Raion's sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 27''' — The Dance of a Burning World is optimized for large, wide-area attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — The Dance of a Burning World is a technique used by the Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The Dance of a Burning World involves the knowledge that everything is being destroyed around the user.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Dance of a Burning World is a Combat Art that lights the void on fire.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
